framework.name: Sales & Pipeline Management Process
framework.description: End-to-end sales process from lead capture to closed-won

context.agency_type_desc: Established agency requiring formal SOP documentation for scale.

steps.description: Build qualification scorecard scoring E-Commerce leads on budget, authority, need, timeline, and fit with Lead Generation Automation offerings. Define minimum threshold for pipeline entry.
Standard procedure for Discovery Call Script adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Prepare environment, case studies, and industry-specific examples for E-Commerce prospects. Configure Lead Generation Automation demo scenario showing measurable outcomes.
Standard procedure for Proposal Delivery Protocol adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Objection Response Matrix adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Follow-Up Sequence Template adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Contract Negotiation Guide adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Close Process Checklist adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Handoff to Delivery Team adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Lost Deal Analysis Template adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for CRM Hygiene Standard adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Pipeline Review Agenda adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
Standard procedure for Referral Request Script adapted for E-Commerce clients with Lead Generation Automation focus.
